comments.comment:
Used CEMs data to report NOx data from CTs, Emissions Factors for boilers, duct burners, comfort heating and Diesel Generator. 
Break-down is as follows:
Comfort Heating: 0.093 tonne (EFs)
Turbines: 242.047 tonne (CEMS)
Boilers and duct burners: 9.847 tonne (EFs)
Diesel Generator: 0.065 tonne (EFs)
